query: CREATE TABLE `admin_credentials` (`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL, `username` varchar(128) NOT NULL, `passwordHash` varchar(256) NOT NULL, `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()), `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CONSTRAINT `admin_credentials_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`), CONSTRAINT `admin_credentials_username_unique` UNIQUE(`username`))
